summary: Senior Frontend Engineer with 12+ years building production web and mobile products across remote teams, with deep React, TypeScript, React Native, Tailwind CSS, REST API, WebSocket, and SQL experience. Shipped developer-facing and customer-facing interfaces, led frontend standards, and mentored engineers while delivering measurable results such as cutting monorepo build times from about 15 minutes to 3 minutes, improving API response times by 35%, and reducing release cycles from one week to less than 24 hours. Brings hands-on backend depth in Go and Rust for API-heavy systems, with a consistent focus on product polish, performance, and clear user workflows.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Co-led OpenZeppelin Defender 2.0 Secure Audit as one of two engineers, building a React and TypeScript frontend with Zustand so auditors could track findings, verify fixes, and deliver final PDF reports with clients.
Built SDK capabilities for Defender and the open-source Relayer so developers could integrate the products and build custom automation tooling.
Contributed to internal React and Next.js initiatives, helping shape frontend architecture decisions across rendering strategy, state management, and localization.
Led end-to-end testing for Defender with Playwright on critical user flows, improving release confidence for a complex production frontend.
Refactored the TypeScript monorepo build system, cutting build times from about 15 minutes to 3 minutes in local and CI runs while reducing bundle size and speeding up pull request cycles.

Owned the Rust-based open-source Relayer work for Ethereum-compatible networks, including RPC balancing, retry and failover behavior, cloud KMS signer integrations, and a fix for a critical nonce race condition.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Built a React and TypeScript presentation feature for Premise's client platform that surfaced up-to-date, often live data through a single shareable URL for account managers and clients.
Helped migrate key entities from REST to GraphQL with Apollo, including Express.js service updates, improving API response times by 35% and lowering server usage.
Improved release reliability with broader Jest coverage and GitHub Actions quality gates, cutting release cycles to less than 24 hours.
Standardized UI work with Material UI and Storybook, reducing prototyping time from one week to one day and improving consistency across shared components.

workExperience.title: System Architect
description: Improved architecture and delivery for a legacy internal platform, working across product, engineering, and infrastructure to reduce delivery cycles from months to about two weeks.
Implemented transaction-related API flows with Express.js, including Transbank payment processing use cases.
Worked across frontend modernization efforts with React, Redux, and Angular as the platform moved away from Internet Explorer-only constraints and toward modern browser support.

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Led development of an internal integration and onboarding platform with Go, Node.js, and Angular, saving $75,000 annually and helping customer service teams onboard merchants faster.

Implemented real-time catalog and pricing updates with Go and Kafka, moving core logic from a previous Python ETL flow so product and discount changes reached the app faster and contributed to a 21% increase in CSAT.

workExperience.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Delivered more than five web and mobile products end to end across medical, industrial, government, legal, and cultural sectors.
Led architecture decisions and set engineering standards for TypeScript, React, React Native, and Redux across the company.
Built React Native mobile applications for iOS and Android client products, aligning app architecture and delivery practices with shared web platform standards.
Mentored five developers through pairing, code reviews, and workshops focused on architecture, testing, and code quality.
Worked directly with clients through discovery calls, demos, and status updates, translating requirements into shipped products under short deadlines.

workExperience.title: Fullstack Developer
description: Helped build Dxpress from idea to launch inside a small product and engineering team, focusing on real-time operational features and product ETL workflows across Python and Go services.
Applied frontend skills in Angular for operational interfaces while managing metrics, monitoring, and deployment workflows in GCP.

workExperience.title: Junior Software Developer
description: Started as a junior developer and took on growing frontend ownership, helping introduce Node.js and AngularJS into the agency stack.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science

company_profile.description: Alpaca is a California-headquartered brokerage infrastructure technology company and self-clearing broker-dealer that offers developer-friendly APIs for trading, market data, execution, and custody across stocks, ETFs, options, crypto, and related financial products.
company_profile.mission: Open financial services to everyone on the planet.
company_profile.vision: Build the global de facto standard infrastructure for investing through proprietary technology, regulatory infrastructure, and developer-friendly APIs.
services: Programmatic trading and market data access
company_profile.business_model: API-driven brokerage infrastructure and clearing platform serving both businesses and self-directed trading customers.
recent_signals: Powering more than 7 million brokerage accounts across 40+ countries
Serving a developer community of 61,000+ monthly active developers
Transitioned to self-clearing at DTCC in 2024 and added OCC, FICC, and Nasdaq memberships in 2025
Recognized with Postman's Best API award in 2024 and BrokerChooser's Best Broker for Algorithmic Trading in 2026
Recently launched an MCP Server for AI-assisted trading workflows
